description: CompositionBlue round neck top made of 100% viscose, sleeveless with the left shoulder gathered into a pleated bunch, graphic print all over the front with glitter print and metallic embellishments on the right chestFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironFlaunt your feminine side in style with this blue top from jealous 21. The stylish sleeves with the gathered left shoulder strap creates a unique fashion statement, while the metallic embellishments coupled with silver glitter print along the right chest gives the top a classy edge. Team this with jeans, shorts or skirts and stylish footwear from the wide range at myntra for that fashionable look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
